name: litmdx-repo
description: Fast, modern documentation framework built on React + MDX
author: nol4ej

scripts.dev: concurrently -n core,cli,server -c blue,cyan,green --kill-others-on-fail "bun run --filter @litmdx/core dev" "bun run --filter litmdx dev" "bun ./packages/cli/src/bin/cli.ts dev"
scripts.build:packages: bun run --filter './packages/core' build && bun run --filter './packages/cli' build && bun run --filter './packages/create-litmdx' build
scripts.test: bun run --filter '@litmdx/core' test && bun run --filter 'litmdx' test && bun run --filter 'create-litmdx' test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter 'litmdx' typecheck && bun run --filter '@litmdx/core' typecheck && bun run --filter 'create-litmdx' typecheck
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist .litmdx node_modules packages/core/dist packages/core/node_modules packages/cli/dist packages/cli/node_modules packages/create-litmdx/dist packages/create-litmdx/node_modules
scripts.setup: sh -c 'if [ -f bun.lockb ] || [ -f bun.lock ]; then bun install; elif [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then pnpm install; elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then yarn install; else npm install; fi' && bun run build:packages
